narrative:
Valleyview-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 450 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.7%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.6 percentage points.
